examples.sentence: このイベントは、年齢を問わず、誰でも参加できます。
examples.translation: This event is open to everyone, regardless of age.
examples.translationEn: This event is open to everyone, regardless of age
examples.romaji: Kono ibento wa, nenrei o towazu, dare demo sanka dekimasu.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: This event is open to everyone, regardless of age

examples.sentence: このスーパーは、日曜日を問わず、毎日開いています。
examples.translation: This supermarket is open every day, regardless of Sunday.
examples.translationEn: This supermarket is open every day, regardless of Sunday
examples.romaji: Kono suupaa wa, nichiyoubi o towazu, mainichi aite imasu.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: This supermarket is open every day, regardless of Sunday

examples.sentence: 彼女は、暑さ寒さを問わず、毎朝散歩をしています。
examples.translation: She takes a walk every morning, no matter the heat or cold.
examples.translationEn: She takes a walk every morning, no matter the heat or cold
examples.romaji: Kanojo wa, atsusa samusa o towazu, maiasa sanpo o shite imasu.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: She takes a walk every morning, no matter the heat or cold

examples.sentence: 社長は、国籍を問わず、すべての社員を平等に扱っています。
examples.translation: The company president treats all employees equally, regardless of nationality.
examples.translationEn: The company president treats all employees equally, regardless of nationality
examples.romaji: Shachou wa, kokuseki o towazu, subete no shain o byoudou ni atsukatte imasu.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: The company president treats all employees equally, regardless of nationality

examples.sentence: 愛を込めて料理を作りました。
examples.translation: I cooked the meal with love.
examples.translationEn: I cooked the meal with love
examples.romaji: Ai wo komete ryouri wo tsukurimashita.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: I cooked the meal with love

examples.sentence: 感謝を込めて先生にお礼の手紙を書きました。
examples.translation: I wrote a thank-you letter to my teacher, filled with gratitude.
examples.translationEn: I wrote a thank-you letter to my teacher, filled with gratitude
examples.romaji: Kansha wo komete sensei ni orei no tegami wo kakimashita.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: I wrote a thank-you letter to my teacher, filled with gratitude

examples.sentence: 彼は全力を込めて最後の瞬間まで戦いました。
examples.translation: He fought until the last moment with all his strength.
examples.translationEn: He fought until the last moment with all his strength
examples.romaji: Kare wa zenryoku wo komete saigo no shunkan made tatakaimashita.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: He fought until the last moment with all his strength

examples.sentence: 彼女は悲しみを込めて友達へ別れの言葉を伝えました。
examples.translation: She conveyed her farewell words to her friend with sadness.
examples.translationEn: She conveyed her farewell words to her friend with sadness
examples.romaji: Kanojo wa kanashimi wo komete tomodachi e wakare no kotoba wo tsutaemashita.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: She conveyed her farewell words to her friend with sadness

examples.sentence: インターネットを通じて友達と連絡を取ります。
examples.translation: I keep in touch with my friends through the internet.
examples.translationEn: I keep in touch with my friends through the internet
examples.romaji: Intaanetto wo tsuujite tomodachi to renraku wo torimasu.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: I keep in touch with my friends through the internet

examples.sentence: 彼は一日を通じて熱心に働いています。
examples.translation: He works diligently throughout the day.
examples.translationEn: He works diligently throughout the day
examples.romaji: Kare wa ichinichi wo tsuujite nesshin ni hataraite imasu.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: He works diligently throughout the day

examples.sentence: このイベントは週末を通じて開催されます。
examples.translation: This event will take place throughout the weekend.
examples.translationEn: This event will take place throughout the weekend
examples.romaji: Kono ibento wa shuumatsu wo tsuujite kaisai saremasu.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: This event will take place throughout the weekend

examples.sentence: その花は春を通じて咲いています。

examples.translationEn: The flowers bloom throughout the spring
examples.romaji: Sono hana wa haru wo tsuujite saiteimasu.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: The flowers bloom throughout the spring

examples.sentence: 彼女は地図を頼りに旅行をしている。
examples.translation: She is traveling relying on a map.
examples.translationEn: She is traveling relying on a map
examples.romaji: Kanojo wa chizu wo tayori ni ryokou wo shite iru.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: She is traveling relying on a map

examples.sentence: 多くの人が彼の力を頼りに生活している。
examples.translation: Many people are living depending on his strength.
examples.translationEn: Many people are living depending on his strength
examples.romaji: Ooku no hito ga kare no chikara wo tayori ni seikatsu shite iru.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Many people are living depending on his strength

examples.sentence: このプロジェクトでは、君のスキルを頼りにしています。
examples.translation: In this project, we are counting on your skills.
examples.translationEn: In this project, we are counting on your skills
examples.romaji: Kono purojekuto de wa, kimi no sukiru wo tayori ni shiteimasu.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: In this project, we are counting on your skills

examples.sentence: 彼は友達の助けを頼りに問題を解決しようとした。
examples.translation: He tried to solve the problem relying on his friend's help.
examples.translationEn: He tried to solve the problem relying on his friends help
examples.romaji: Kare wa tomodachi no tasuke wo tayori ni mondai wo kaiketsu shiyou to shita.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: He tried to solve the problem relying on his friends help

examples.sentence: 技術が進化する一方、生活が忙しくなっている。
examples.translation: While technology advances, life is getting busier.

examples.sentence: この料理は美味しい一方、ちょっと高いです。
